variants: Violet Hamilton is a notable figure in the field of forest management. She authored the Whisperfern Signal Controller, a device that enhances communication in remote forest areas. Under the guidance of her mentor Xena Vu, Violet honed her skills and knowledge. Her research and projects have been primarily funded by the Deepcurrent Catalyst Fund.
